user_feedback: Track 1 REWRITE scope overridden from top-5 to full 14. User delegated code-lift risk responsibility back to orchestrator ('PR skoro nectu, necham to na tobe'). Compensating controls REQUIRED in Phase 4 spec: (1) anti-pattern constraint 'no awk+source code-lift in new or rewritten test scenarios', (2) mandatory use of tests/lib/fixtures.sh helpers or inline bash, (3) Phase 5 TDD produces a harness-gate test scenario (e.g., 'no-awk-source-in-new-tests.sh') that grep-scans all v6.10.0-touched tests and fails if the pattern appears, (4) Phase 8 Commander MUST verify this gate passed. Other judge recommendations stand: Track 2 advisory-only opt-in hook with dispatched_at check, Track 3 scope = 11 agents (not 8), DSL-lite = 3 helpers.

compensating_controls: Phase 4 spec: anti-pattern constraint 'no awk+source code-lift'
Phase 4 spec: mandatory tests/lib/fixtures.sh DSL-lite usage OR inline bash (no cross-file sourcing except fixtures.sh)
Phase 5 TDD: harness-gate scenario grep-scanning new/rewritten tests for awk+source pattern (fail on match)
Phase 8 Commander: verify the new harness gate passes
